Name: Innovative Soloist Series IP240 Medium Birch Marimba Mallets
Description:
Warm Tone and Clear Articulation for Solo Marimba

The Innovative Percussion IP240 Soloist Series Medium Marimba Mallets are expertly crafted to deliver a brilliant, rich tone with the warmest fundamental possible. Designed with the demanding marimba virtuoso in mind, these medium-hardness mallets offer slightly more immediate articulation than the softer IP200 model. This makes the IP240 an exceptionally popular, highly versatile choice for solo repertoire and intimate percussion ensemble performances.

Premium Materials for Maximum Musicality

Every step of the manufacturing process is tailored to meet the exacting standards of today's professional percussionists. The IP240 features a carefully layered core and custom-spun yarn to produce a world-class sound.

Hard Rubber Core: The core is covered in a series of precise latex combinations to produce a full, resonant fundamental without excessive contact noise.
100% Wool Wrap: Custom-manufactured exclusively for Innovative Percussion, the wool yarn wrap provides a lush, warm attack without sacrificing clarity.
Polished Birch Handles: The rigid birch shafts are polished to a smooth, natural finish, ensuring excellent control and comfort during complex four-mallet passages.
Ideal for the Middle Register

While the IP240 is highly adaptable across the instrument, it is specifically voiced to speak beautifully within the middle three octaves of a 5-octave marimba. The balanced weight distribution and oval head shape prevent the mallets from feeling too top-heavy, providing the player with an effortless, nimble feel across the keyboard.

Name: Vic Firth Robert Van Sice Marimba Mallets - Medium
Description:
The Vic Firth M114 Robert Van Sice Medium Marimba Mallets are the most popular model in the entire signature series. Offering unparalleled versatility, the M114 is designed to cover the entire range of the marimba, producing a singing, vibrant sound that is full of life.

Designed by a Marimba Master

Respected internationally as a soloist and masterclass instructor, Robert Van Sice designed this series with an exclusive yarn hand-wrapping technique. This construction virtually eliminates the harsh sound of mallet-to-bar contact. A special interlocking stitch pattern maintains the integrity of the head, while extra-long maple handles provide superior reach and leverage.

Features:
Voicing: Medium articulation, offering incredible versatility across the entire marimba range.
Seamless Articulation: Exclusive hand-wrapped yarn eliminates the sound of bar contact.
Extended Leverage: Long maple shafts provide incredible reach across the keyboard.
Dimensions: 17" Length | Maple Handles

Name: Vic Firth Robert Van Sice Keyboard Mallets - Medium
Description:
The Robert van Sice Signature Keyboard mallets from Vic Firth feature a heavy synthetic core that produces a very robust and complete sound. These yarn wound marimba mallets have been crafted with an exclusive hand-wrapping technique that virtually eliminates the sound of bar contact. A special interlocking stitch pattern maintains the integrity of the head. The maple handles are 17″ long and provide an excellent feel and control. With a full depth of sound and excellent versatility of color, these mallets are the perfect choice for music from Japanese repertoire and pieces demanding multiple layers of timbre.

The M124 medium mallets are the most popular in the series. They feature an extraordinary range of color.

Name: Innovative Ludwig Albert IP3106B Medium Hard Birch Marimba Mallets
Description:
This line of professional keyboard mallets by Innovative Percussion has been specifically designed for Belgium marimba artist Ludwig Albert III. The eight models, previously only offered on rattan handles, are now available on natural birch handles with specially weighted rubber cores of varying sizes and degrees of hardness.

The IP3106B is a medium hard marimba mallet with birch handles.

Name: Vic Firth Robert Van Sice Marimba Mallets - Medium Soft
Description:
Vic Firth M113 Robert Van Sice Medium Soft Marimba Mallets are a general mallet that covers the lower four octaves of the marimba.

Respected internationally as a soloist, teacher and masterclass instructor, Robert Van Sice designed this series of yarn wound marimba mallets with an exclusive hand-wrapping technique that virtually eliminates the sound of bar contact. A special interlocking stitch pattern maintains the integrity of the head. With extra long maple handles for read and leverage. In pairs.

Length: 17"

Name: Liberty One LMM Medium Yarn Birch Marimba Mallets
Description:
These Liberty One Medium Yarn Marimba Mallets are crafted using high-quality materials to deliver reliable performance, consistency, and durability for everyday use. Featuring premium birch handles paired with a carefully wrapped core, these mallets produce a balanced, full tone that works well across a wide range of playing situations and repertoire.

The medium yarn mallet offers a clear, musical response that makes these mallets an excellent general-purpose choice for marimba practice, ensemble playing, and solo repertoire. Their versatility also extends beyond keyboard percussion, as they function beautifully as suspended cymbal mallets, providing minimal contact noise and controlled articulation.

Designed to compete with other comparable mallets on the market, Liberty One mallets deliver professional-level playability at a fraction of the price. This makes them a smart option for students, educators, and advancing percussionists looking for dependable mallets without the premium cost.

These mallets are sold in pairs

High-quality birch handles for comfortable feel and consistent balance
Medium hardness suitable for practice, ensemble, and solo repertoire
Versatile design also works well for suspended cymbal playing

Name: Marimba One Double Helix DHB3 Medium Hard Birch Mallets
Description:
The Double Helix Series was developed to bring out the warmth of the fundamental throughout the range of the 5-octave marimba. The relaxed yarn tension on these mallets enhances the smooth, dark attack of the mallet.

The exclusive patent pending “double helix wrap” technique allows you to easily identify each mallet in the series. Two strands of yarn are wrapped independently of each other, creating a woven effect. After one of the strands makes a revolution around the mallet head, the other strand makes a revolution, securing the previous strand. This locks the yarn in place and prevents it from unraveling. This unique method of wrapping provides our mallets with their distinct look, and exceptional sound.

Name: Marimba One Double Helix DHB4 Medium Birch Mallets
Description:
The Double Helix Series was developed to bring out the warmth of the fundamental throughout the range of the 5-octave marimba. The relaxed yarn tension on these mallets enhances the smooth, dark attack of the mallet.

The exclusive patent pending “double helix wrap” technique allows you to easily identify each mallet in the series. Two strands of yarn are wrapped independently of each other, creating a woven effect. After one of the strands makes a revolution around the mallet head, the other strand makes a revolution, securing the previous strand. This locks the yarn in place and prevents it from unraveling. This unique method of wrapping provides our mallets with their distinct look, and exceptional sound.

Name: Innovative Rattan Series RS251 Medium Rattan Vibe/Marimba Mallets
Description: This line of mallets has been designed for the contemporary vibraphonist. The rubber mushroom shaped core achieves a rich and fundamentally warm tone. Each pair is hand matched for weight, size and sound.

Name: Encore NZ3B Nancy Zeltsman Medium Hard Birch Marimba Mallets
Description:
The Encore NZ3B Nancy Zeltsman "Medium Hard" mallets are the most versatile mallets in the line. They sound excellent in all registers, particularly the middle of the instrument (from about C3 to C6). As a side note, NZ3's are especially valuable to have in your collection at different levels of wear. An old NZ3 is essentially an "NZ2.5"! Birch Handles.

One unique characteristic of my line is that the oval-shape of the mallet head is horizontal rather than vertical. I imagine (and maybe it's true) that the width of the mallet activates more of the vertical grains of wood in every bar-thus contributing to a richer tone. Everything about the construction of my line of mallets-from the cores, to the latex, to the type of yarn-is aimed at helping you to produce a fundamental-rich tone.

- Nancy Zeltsman

Hardness - Medium Hard
Handles - Birch

Name: Vic Firth Robert Van Sice Marimba Mallets - Medium Hard
Description:
For upper-register clarity and projection, the Vic Firth M115 Robert Van Sice Medium-Hard Marimba Mallets are an outstanding choice. These mallets are voiced to be bright and articulate, perfectly cutting through an ensemble without ever reaching a harsh or "xylophone-like" brilliance.

Exclusive Construction and Reach

To create the perfect singing tone, these mallets are crafted using an exclusive yarn hand-wrapping technique that removes the harsh sound of bar contact. The yarn is secured with a special interlocking stitch pattern to preserve the shape of the head through aggressive playing. Built on extra-long maple handles, performers are granted the reach and leverage needed for modern, multi-octave marimba literature.

Features:
Voicing: Medium-Hard articulation for bright projection without harshness.
Seamless Articulation: Exclusive hand-wrapped yarn eliminates the sound of mallet-to-bar contact.
Extended Leverage: Long maple shafts provide incredible reach across the keyboard.
Dimensions: 17" Length | Maple Handles

Name: Innovative Ludwig Albert IP3105B Medium Birch Marimba Mallets
Description:
This line of professional keyboard mallets by Innovative Percussion has been specifically designed for Belgium marimba artist Ludwig Albert III. The eight models, previously only offered on rattan handles, are now available on natural birch handles with specially weighted rubber cores of varying sizes and degrees of hardness.

The IP31015B is a medium marimba mallet with birch handles.

Name: Innovative Fundamental Series F1.5 Medium Marimba Mallets
Description:
Innovative Percussion F1.5 Medium Marimba Mallets feature black painted birch handles, a rubber core to create a full rich tone, and extra durable synthetic yarn.

Manufactured by the leader in high quality keyboard mallets, the Innovative Percussion Fundamental Series Keyboard Mallets were specifically designed with the beginning percussionist and budget conscious band director in mind. This economical series offers the beginning percussionist and band director a line of quality keyboard mallets at an affordable price.

The Fundamental Series is available in 15 different models. All models feature black birch dowels and the two vibraphone models are also available with high quality rattan handles.

Name: Vic Firth Robert Van Sice Keyboard Mallets - Medium Soft
Description:

The M123 is a very versatile medium soft mallet that can be used throughout the entire range of the instrument.

Name: Marimba One Double Helix DHB2 Hard Birch Mallets
Description:

Name: Salyers Etude Series Birch Marimba Mallets - Medium
Description:
The Salyers Percussion E20 medium yarn mallet features birch shafts, a rubber core and high quality wool/nylon blend yarn for a full, round tone. This mallet is an excellent choice for marimba and suspended cymbal.

The Etude Series is designed to be a high quality and economical solution for percussionists and band directors. The Etude Series is made with the same quality materials that you will find on many higher priced alternatives. The design, craftsmanship and material selection set this series apart from other “value” brands on the market today.

Name: Innovative Soloist Series IP300 Med Hard Birch Marimba Mallets
Description:
The Innovative Percussion IP300 Soloist Series Medium Hard Marimba Mallets are slightly harder than the IP275 model and are designed for use in the upper 4 octaves of a 5 octave marimba. This model features 100% wool yarn, birch handles and hard rubber cores that help to create a full, rich tome and warm fundamental.

Designed with the marimba virtuoso in mind, the Soloist Series is constructed using hard rubber cores, covered in a series of latex combinations. The mallets are wrapped is a 100% wool wrap, custom manufactured specifically for Innovative Percussion, which delivers a brilliant, rich tone with the warmest fundamental possible in all registers of the marimba. The series is offered on birch handles that are polished for the smoothest natural finish. Each step of production insures a mallet designed to meet the highest standards of today's most demanding marimbist.

Name: Malletech Concerto Series CN14 Medium to Medium Hard Birch Marimba Mallets
Description:
The CN14 is a general mallet that is very versatile in respect to its application in concerto and ensemble literature. The most popular “general” mallet in the Concerto Series. Medium to Medium Hard, Multi-Toned.

The six models that comprise the Concerto Series have been designed specifically for those players looking for a heavy mallet with a big sound that will project through a large ensemble, but do not want the contact noise that is usually associated with this type of mallet. Compared to standard traditional mallets of similar hardness, the player will immediately notice proportionally more fundamental tone and greater volume. While many synthetic yarns suffer from high-pitched “tick”, this yarn is very quiet on the attack, while exceeding the durability and abrasion resistance of nylon.

Name: Encore GRADB Nancy Zeltsman Graduated Birch Mallet Set
Description:
“The Encore Nancy Zeltsman Graduated Set was devised to provide an affordable means to try a graduated set if you haven’t already done so. This is a combination of mallets I use about 60% of the time. It naturally ‘voices’ most chord playing. In essence, this graduated set is an example of the way my entire line was designed to best flatter different registers of the instrument.

This Graduated Set of 4 Encore Nancy Zeltsman’s mallets includes 1 each of NZ2B Medium Harder, NZ3B Medium Hard, NZ4B Medium and NZ6B Articulate Bass. Birch Handles.

One unique characteristic of my line is that the oval-shape of the mallet head is horizontal rather than vertical. I imagine (and maybe it’s true) that the width of the mallet activates more of the vertical grains of wood in every bar-thus contributing to a richer tone. Everything about the construction of my line of mallets-from the cores, to the latex, to the type of yarn-is aimed at helping you to produce a fundamental-rich tone.”

- Nancy Zeltsman

Name: Marimba One Round Sound Birch Marimba Mallets - Medium
Description:
Marimba One Round Sound mallets are the perfect marriage of Marimba One sound quality and the needs of percussionists. The RSB3 is a medium mallet, perfect balance for the middle range, with a birch handle.

Marimba One Round Sound series mallets feature the same Marimba One excellence at a more affordable price. They are a lightweight mallet with warmth and articulation. This is the mallet that works to make you sound great. Double-wound using Marimba One’s exclusive technology.

Name: Innovative Mark Ford IP813 Medium Hard Birch Marimba Mallets
Description: The Strong Legato series from the Innovative Percussion Mark Ford line is designed to produce a very Strong Legato tone with well defined fundamentals. IP813 Medium Hard mallet from this series does just that. It works great in a set or in a solo setting. A rubber core wrapped in soft yarn on top of an unfinished birch handle gives the player control and dynamics.

Name: Vic Firth Robert Van Sice Marimba Mallets - Soft
Description:
Vic Firth M112 Robert Van Sice Soft Marimba Mallets produces a broad sound with tremendous projections that is dark, but not muffled.

Respected internationally as a soloist, teacher and masterclass instructor, Robert Van Sice designed this series of yarn wound marimba mallets with an exclusive hand-wrapping technique that virtually eliminates the sound of bar contact. A special interlocking stitch pattern maintains the integrity of the head. With extra long maple handles for read and leverage. In pairs.

Length: 17"

Name: Malletech Eric Sammut ES12 Soft to Medium Hard Birch Marimba Mallets
Description:
Soft to medium-hard range of tonality. Birch shafts.

One of the rising stars of the marimba, Eric is noted for his extremely unique and expressive style. His mallets feature a custom and distinctive orange yarn, and unusually heavy heads for a very full sound.

Name: Marimba One Double Helix DHB5 Medium Soft Birch Mallets
Description:
The Double Helix Series was developed to bring out the warmth of the fundamental throughout the range of the 5-octave marimba. The relaxed yarn tension on these mallets enhances the smooth, dark attack of the mallet.

Two strands of yarn are wrapped independently of each other, creating a woven effect. Name: Malletech Michael Burritt Version 2 MB13-V2 Marimba Mallets - Medium to Medium Hard
Description:
Multi-toned: medium to medium hard with red label.

Provides a full sound in all the registers and rolls well at medium dynamic levels. This is a great general mallet for those players who want the sound of a rubber core and a bit of bite to the attack.

Mike is internationally respected as a marimba virtuoso, composer and teacher. The six models of the Michael Burritt Series are built around 1 1/8″ diameter natural rubber cores. All of the models also have one or more additional layers of latex rubber on top of the natural rubber for a more complex multi-toned response pattern. All models are wrapped and stitched with a synthetic blend that has good durability. The yarn has also been designed to have just a touch of contact “chiff” for the extra cutting power Michael requires. All models feature selected birch shafts.

Synthetic Yarn
Medium Hard to Medium Hard Hardness (Multi-tonal)
Birch Shafts
Oval Shaped Mallet Head

Name: Innovative Ludwig Albert IP3104B Medium Soft Birch Marimba Mallets
Description:
This line of professional keyboard mallets by Innovative Percussion has been specifically designed for Belgium marimba artist Ludwig Albert III. Name: Innovative Casey Cangelosi CGL3 Low-Mid Register Marimba Mallets
Description:
Wrapped in an environmentally friendly bamboo-blended cord, the Casey Cangelosi Series Marimba Mallets combines the rich, warm tonal characteristics of yarn with the articulate clarity of cord. These mallets are built on birch dowels with a natural finish and allow for a heavy bass sound without sounding muddy or washy, a delicate touch for lyrical legato passages that speak from the mallet immediately, and a steady timbre throughout the dynamic range. The two softest mallets are also available with a soft yarn wrap.

The CGL3 is intended for the low to mid register of the marimba. This mallet begins to dip into the qualities of bass sound for colors of long lyrical legato.

Name: Vic Firth Robert Van Sice Keyboard Mallets - Medium Hard

With a full depth of sound and excellent versatility of color, these mallets are the perfect choice for music from Japanese repertoire and pieces demanding multiple layers of timbre.

The M125 medium hard mallets are the most expressive of the series and is an ideal choice for modern marimba repertoire.

Name: Innovative Soloist Series IP275 Med Hard Legato Birch Marimba Mallets
Description:
The Innovative Percussion IP275 Soloist Series Medium Hard Legato Marimba Mallets are a good solo mallet that works through the entire range of the marimba and feature 100% wool yarn, birch handles and hard rubber cores that help to create a full, rich tome and warm fundamental.

Designed with the marimba virtuoso in mind, the Soloist Series is constructed using hard rubber cores, covered in a series of latex combinations. The series is offered on birch handles that are polished for the smoothest natural finish. Each step of production insures a mallet designed to meet the highest standards of today's most demanding marimbist.

Name: Innovative Soloist Series IP240N Medium Birch Marimba Mallets - Natural Handles
Description:
Innovative Percussion's most popular series of solo marimba mallets is now offered with unfinished birch handles thanks to countless requests. All six models are available with a natural finish that provides a more slip resistant grip that is ideal for players who prefer an enhanced grip on their mallets.

The Innovative Percussion IP240N Soloist Series Medium Marimba Mallets are designed for use in the middle 3 octaves of a 5 octave marimba but offers more articulation than the IP200 model. The IP240N mallets feature 100% wool yarn and hard rubber cores that help to create a full, rich tome and warm fundamental.

Designed with the marimba virtuoso in mind, the Soloist Series is constructed using hard rubber cores, covered in a series of latex combinations. Name: Vic Firth Virtuoso Series Keyboard Mallets - Medium
Description:
Vic Firth M212 Virtuoso Series Medium Marimba Mallets are the most versatile mallet of the Virtuoso Series. An all-purpose marimba mallet.

Designed for the solo marimba performer, the Vic Firth Virtuoso Series features a rubber core wrapped with a wool blend yarn for an enhanced warm and full-bodied sound. The handles are made of birch with a unique "slip-resistant" finish for excellent feel and enhanced control. A fine choice in ensemble settings as well.

Length: 17"

Name: Encore NZ2B Nancy Zeltsman Medium Harder Birch Marimba Mallets
Description:
The Encore NZ2B Nancy Zeltsman "Medium Harder" mallets speak very easily, and produce a clear, warmer sound-perfect for playing a melody with the upper mallet. These are intended for more general use than the NZ1s. Birch Handles.

One unique characteristic of my line is that the oval-shape of the mallet head is horizontal rather than vertical. I imagine (and maybe it's true) that the width of the mallet activates more of the vertical grains of wood in every bar-thus contributing to a richer tone. Everything about the construction of my line of mallets-from the cores, to the latex, to the type of yarn-is aimed at helping you to produce a fundamental-rich tone.

- Nancy Zeltsman

Hardness - Medium Harder
Handles - Birch

Name: Vic Firth Terry Gibbs Keyboard - Medium - Blue Cord
Description:
Vic Firth M31 Terry Gibbs Vibraphone or Marimba Mallets were conceived through extensive discussion and research with Terry Gibbs. Medium vibe or marimba. Rattan handles.

Length = 15 1/4"

Name: Innovative Sandi Rennick Series Medium Marimba Mallets
Description:
Constructed with uniquely weighted compact cores, the IP4000 series marimba mallets were designed to the specifications of Sandi Rennick, the Front Ensemble Arranger of the 9-time DCI World Champion Santa Clara Vanguard. Putting more weight in the players hands, these models produce a focused sound which speaks quickly, and was created with today's modern amplified keyboard section in mind.

Starting with durable birch handles in a matte finish, these implements are also wrapped with synthetic yarn which makes them able to withstand the needs of rigorous rehearsal and performance schedules. The versatility found in the Sandi Rennick series makes balancing and blending your ensemble easier than ever before.

Sandi Rennick Series

Name: Malletech Late Nite Series Super Soft Mallets - Birch Handles
Description:
The Malletech Late Night Series grants mallet players the ability to practice on their instrument delivering an extremely low volume sound. Essentially this is the practice pad for mallet players. Play with normal natural feel, mallets to bar. No covers, mutes or bar treatments needed. Perfect for warming up backstage, apartment or dorm living situations.

The LN1B is loosely wrapped with a soft yarn delivering a super soft tone, nearly silent with slurring articulation.

Birch Handles

Name: Encore NZ4B Nancy Zeltsman Medium Birch Marimba Mallets
Description:
The Encore NZ4B Nancy Zeltsman "Medium" mallets are the ideal "tenor" mallet in a graduated set, because of their warm sound. For rolls and chorale playing in the medium-low register, they have a wonderful legato quality. I seldom use these above middle-C. Birch Handles.

One unique characteristic of my line is that the oval-shape of the mallet head is horizontal rather than vertical. I imagine (and maybe it's true) that the width of the mallet activates more of the vertical grains of wood in every bar-thus contributing to a richer tone. Everything about the construction of my line of mallets-from the cores, to the latex, to the type of yarn-is aimed at helping you to produce a fundamental-rich tone.

Name: Malletech Mtech Marimba Mallets - Medium
Description: These are the Medium Marimba Mallets from the MTech Mallet Series functioning great across the entire instrument. These mallets are designed to pair perfectly with the MTech Marimba series.

Name: Innovative Rattan Series RS301 Hard Rattan Vibe/Marimba Mallets
Description: This line of mallets has been designed for the contemporary vibraphonist. The rubber mushroom shaped core achieves a rich and fundamentally warm tone. Each pair is hand matched for weight, size and sound.

Name: Malletech Eric Sammut ES16 Medium to Medium Hard Birch Marimba Mallets
Description:
Medium to medium hard, multi-toned. Brighter than the ES12 model. Birch shafts.

One of the rising stars of the marimba, Eric is noted for his extremely unique and expressive style. His mallets feature a custom and distinctive orange yarn, and unusually heavy heads for a very full sound.

Name: Innovative Pius Cheung Graduated Marimba Mallet Set - Birch
Description:
The Innovative Percussion Pius Cheung Series Marimba Mallets features six models with rubber cores of varying hardness. Constructed on rattan handles, each model is wrapped with a very unique alpaca-blend yarn that allows the player to produce a musically strong fundamental at extreme dynamic ranges from the utmost silky pianissimo to peasante fortissimo with minimal effort.

The PIUS-GS Series for general playing includes 1 PIUS1B, 2 PIUS3B's, and 1 PIUS4B.

Name: Marimba One Wave Wrap WWXB3 Medium Birch Mallets
Description: The WWXB3 is a medium mallet with Gray/Blaze colored yarn and birch handles. The highest concentration of yarn is wrapped around the mallet's equator, creating an increased striking surface and a mallet that is more responsive than traditionally wrapped mallets. The Wave Wrap's blend of wool and nylon yarn minimizes contact sound and enhances articulation. Using Wave Wrap technology, the mallet is balanced to facilitate the ease of movement in the player's hand. The double equatorial wrap creates a chevron pattern around the playing surface and a distinctive wave on top of the head - two unique visual signatures for these finest of marimba mallets.

Name: Malletech Late Nite Series Soft Mallets - Birch Handles
Description:
The Malletech Late Night Series grants mallet players the ability to practice on their instrument delivering an extremely low volume sound. Essentially this is the practice pad for mallet players. Play with normal natural feel, mallets to bar. No covers, mutes or bar treatments needed. Perfect for warming up backstage, apartment or dorm living situations.

The LN2B is snugly wrapped with a nylon yarn delivering a soft and quiet tone with articulation.

Birch Handles

Name: Balter Ensemble Series 13B Medium Blue Yarn Marimba Mallet - Birch
Description:
The Balter Ensemble Series Birch 13B Medium Blue Yarn is on of the cornerstones of the Mike Balter keyboard mallet line. These single-tone yarn wound mallets feature solid rubber cores that are the ideal weight for general playing. Their proven reliability has made them an industry standard that continues to exceed the needs of the player.

Type: Blue Yarn
Handle: Birch
Hardness: Medium
Use: Marimba, Vibes

Name: Malletech Leigh Howard Stevens LS15 Medium Soft–Hard Birch Marimba Mallets
Description: Medium soft to hard, red label, and multi-toned. A full range medium soft to hard mallet that speaks clearly in all registers, yet still rolls smoothly. The most popular “general use” mallet in the Stevens Series.

Name: Vic Firth Virtuoso Series Keyboard Mallets - Medium Hard

The handles are made of birch with a unique "slip-resistant" finish for excellent feel and enhanced control. A fine choice in ensemble settings as well.

Description:
The Innovative Percussion IP200 Soloist Series Medium Soft Marimba Mallets are designed for use in the middle 3 octaves of a 5 octave marimba and feature 100% wool yarn, birch handles and hard rubber cores that help to create a full, rich tome and warm fundamental.

Designed with the marimba virtuoso in mind, the Soloist Series is constructed using hard rubber cores, covered in a series of latex combinations. The mallets are wrapped is a 100% wool wrap, custom manufactured specifically for Innovative Percussion, which delivers a brilliant, rich tone with the warmest fundamental possible in all registers of the marimba. The series is offered on birch handles that are polished for the smoothest natural finish. Each step of production insures a mallet designed to meet the highest standards of today's most demanding marimbist.

Name: Marimba One Double Helix DHB6 Soft Birch Mallets
Description:
The Double Helix Series was developed to bring out the warmth of the fundamental throughout the range of the 5-octave marimba. The relaxed yarn tension on these mallets enhances the smooth, dark attack of the mallet.

The exclusive patent pending "double helix wrap" technique allows you to easily identify each mallet in the series. Two strands of yarn are wrapped independently of each other, creating a woven effect. After one of the strands makes a revolution around the mallet head, the other strand makes a revolution, securing the previous strand. This locks the yarn in place and prevents it from unraveling. This unique method of wrapping provides our mallets with their distinct look, and exceptional sound.

Name: Vic Firth Terry Gibbs Keyboard - Medium Hard - Green Cord
Description:
Vic Firth M32 Terry Gibbs Vibraphone or Marimba Mallets were conceived through extensive discussion and research with Terry Gibbs. Medium hard vibe or marimba. Rattan handles.

Length = 15 1/4"

Name: Innovative Sandi Rennick Series Medium Hard Marimba Mallets
Description:
Constructed with uniquely weighted compact cores, the IP4000 series marimba mallets were designed to the specifications of Sandi Rennick, the Front Ensemble Arranger of the 9-time DCI World Champion Santa Clara Vanguard. Putting more weight in the players hands, these models produce a focused sound which speaks quickly, and was created with today's modern amplified keyboard section in mind.

Starting with durable birch handles in a matte finish, these implements are also wrapped with synthetic yarn which makes them able to withstand the needs of rigorous rehearsal and performance schedules. The versatility found in the Sandi Rennick series makes balancing and blending your ensemble easier than ever before.

Sandi Rennick Series
IP4001: Soft Marimba
IP4001C: Soft Marimba - Cord
IP4002: Medium Marimba
IP4002C: Medium Marimba - Cord
IP4002.5: Medium Hard Marimba
IP4002.5C: Medium Hard Marimba - Cord
IP4003: Hard Marimba
IP4003C: Hard Marimba - Cord
IP4004: Wrapped Xylophone
IP4005: Soft Vibraphone
IP4006: Medium Vibraphone
IP4007: Hard Vibraphone

Name: Innovative Tom Rarick IP3003 Medium Hard Birch Marimba Mallets
Description:
While the contributions of the front ensemble continue to evolve within the marching idiom, so do the demands of the mallets that are used by their highly talented players. Tom Rarick, percussion arranger for the Bluecoats Drum & Bugle Corps, has assisted Innovative Percussion with the design of this unique series of keyboard mallets.

The Tom Rarick Series marimba mallets from Innovative Percussion feature large round cores wrapped with a light grey synthetic wool-blend yarn, while the vibraphone mallets have cord-wrapped large oval cores. All 7 models are built on slightly larger (11/32") polished birch handles. The heavier cores increase projection and enhance the fundamental tone, while the larger handles help balance and control.

IP3001 - Soft Marimba
IP3002 - Medium Soft Marimba
IP3003 - Medium Hard Marimba
IP3004 - Hard Marimba
IP3005 - Soft Vibraphone
IP3006 - Medium Vibraphone
IP3007 - Hard VIbraphone

Name: Innovative Mark Ford IP812 Medium Soft Birch Marimba Mallets
Description: Innovative Percussion's Mark Ford IP812 Medium Soft mallet gives a Strong Legato sound with very defined fundamentals. This is achieved with a well balanced rubber core covered in fine quality soft yarn mounted on an unfinished birch handle. This allows the player control and ease of play in the performance.

Name: Marimba One Wave Wrap WWXB2 Medium Hard Birch Mallets
Description: The WWXB2 is a medium hard mallet with Gray/Sangria colored yarn and birch handles. The highest concentration of yarn is wrapped around the mallet's equator, creating an increased striking surface and a mallet that is more responsive than traditionally wrapped mallets. The Wave Wrap's blend of wool and nylon yarn minimizes contact sound and enhances articulation. Using Wave Wrap technology, the mallet is balanced to facilitate the ease of movement in the player's hand. The double equatorial wrap creates a chevron pattern around the playing surface and a distinctive wave on top of the head - two unique visual signatures for these finest of marimba mallets.

Name: Innovative Fundamental Series F2 Hard Marimba Mallets
Description:
Innovative Percussion F2 Hard Marimba Mallets feature black painted birch handles, a rubber core to create a full rich tone, and extra durable synthetic yarn.

Manufactured by the leader in high quality keyboard mallets, the Innovative Percussion Fundamental Series Keyboard Mallets were specifically designed with the beginning percussionist and budget conscious band director in mind. This economical series offers the beginning percussionist and band director a line of quality keyboard mallets at an affordable price.

The Fundamental Series is available in 15 different models. All models feature black birch dowels and the two vibraphone models are also available with high quality rattan handles.

Name: Innovative Casey Cangelosi CGL4 Mid-High Register Marimba Mallets
Description:
Wrapped in an environmentally friendly bamboo-blended cord, the Casey Cangelosi Series Marimba Mallets combines the rich, warm tonal characteristics of yarn with the articulate clarity of cord. These mallets are built on birch dowels with a natural finish and allow for a heavy bass sound without sounding muddy or washy, a delicate touch for lyrical legato passages that speak from the mallet immediately, and a steady timbre throughout the dynamic range. The two softest mallets are also available with a soft yarn wrap.

The CGL4 is intended for the mid to high register of the marimba. This mallet is warm and round with a gentle attack for general playing.

Name: Liberty One Scholastic Series Medium Marimba Mallets
Description:
These Liberty One Scholastic Series Marimba Mallets feature birch handles and a medium yarn head that is suitable for general playing. They also make great suspended cymbal mallets.

Handles - Birch
Medium Yarn

Name: Marimba One Katarzyna Mycka KMB3 Medium Hard Birch Mallets
Description:
The Katarzyna Mycka Professional Mallet Series are wrapped very tightly with all synthetic yarn. The combination of synthetic yarn and the tight wrap gives the immediate response of the bar that is required for ensemble and orchestra playing. The heavy weight of these mallets brings out the warmth of the bars by physically putting into motion the fundamental frequency of the bars.

Katarzyna recommends using this medium hard mallet for such pieces as Keiko Abe's Dream of the Cherry Blossoms (+ one KMB4); Matthias Schmitt's Sechs Miniaturen (6th); Gordon Stout's Two Mexican Dances; Ney Rosauro's Concerto No. 2 (1st Mvmt).

Name: Marimba One Lynn Vartan Graduated Marimba Mallet Set - Birch
Description:
The Marimba One Lynn Vartan series mallets are "just right" for any grip, any piece, any ensemble, or any venue. This graduated set includes one each mallet LVB1, LVB3, LVB3, LVB5. Birch handles.

The incredibly durable and warm-sounding yarns give clarity, articulation and depth. This versatile series covers your needs from the combo vibe/marimba mallets at the hard end of the range down to the super warm and rich soft mallet. You're sure to find your "just right" fit in this line to add to your quiver!

Name: Malletech Kevin Bobo KB11 Medium Birch Marimba Mallets
Description: Kevin Bobo is currently serving as Assistant Professor of Percussion at The University of Kansas. He has performed nationally and internationally as a solo recitalist, clinician, and orchestral percussionist. He holds a Bachelors Degree from Wichita State University where he studied with J.C. Combs and a Masters Degree from Ithaca College where he studied with Gordon Stout.

Name: Innovative Pius Cheung PIUS3B General Marimba Mallets - Birch
Description:
The Innovative Percussion Pius Cheung Series Marimba Mallets features six models with rubber cores of varying hardness. Constructed on Birch handles, each model is wrapped with a very unique alpaca-blend yarn that allows the player to produce a strong musical fundamental at extreme dynamic ranges from the utmost silky pianissimo to peasante fortissimo with minimal effort.

The PIUS3 is a medium, general mid-range mallet for solo playing.

Name: Yamaha Keiko Abe MKA-05 Med Hard Rattan Marimba Mallets
Description:
Yamaha's Keiko Abe Mallet series gives us the MKA05 Medium Hard Mallet. It features a rubber core with a 1mm tube Wrapped around it. A high quality yarn makes for the finishing wrap. The Rattan shaft is measured at 430mm.

This mallet will function pretty well in the soprano or alto voice in a graduated set. You'll also find it has its place in the lower voices too. A good all around mallet.

Name: Malletech Grand Soloist GS13 Medium Hard Birch Marimba Mallets
Description:
A medium-hard, round-headed mallet that has clarity and a full-spectrum response in all ranges, without ever sounding harsh, on birch shafts.

The Grand Soloist mallets have a rubber core plus an additional layer of latex, mounted on select birch shafts. Unlike most of Malletech’s marimba mallets, they are similarly weighted. They are also wrapped differently than any of the other Malletech marimba models. The synthetic blend of yarn is wrapped medium-tightly and angled to produce a rounder head shape. Gordon’s design is a great choice for players who emphasize clear articulation.

Name: Yamaha Keiko Abe MKA-06 Med Soft Rattan Marimba Mallets
Description:
The MKA06 is the Medium Soft Mallet from the Yamaha Keiko Abe Mallet series. It has a rubber core with a 1mm tube wrapped around it. The MKA06 is finished in layers of a high quality yarn. The 430mm straight Rattan shaft will feel well balanced.

This is a great mallet for more legato of pieces that require a more delicate touch. Perfect in any place in a graduated set.

Name: Malletech Chamber Series CH14 Medium Birch Marimba Mallets
Description:
The Malletech Chamber Series CH14 Medium Birch Marimba Mallets are designed for maximum marimba versatility. A very wide range of tonal colors.

-Birch Handles.

Name: Vic Firth American Custom Keyboard - Medium Hard Rubber
Description:
Vic Firth M5 Unwound American Custom Keyboard Mallets are made of medium rubber. For practice on marimba, xylophone and vibraphone. The M5 mallets are 16" long.

The Vic Firth M5 American Custom Keyboard Mallets are designed to address a range of instruments and all dynamic levels. The unwound models deliver maximum sound. With birch shafts for rigidity and consistency, they are favored by players who prefer extra reach without the added flexibility of rattan.

Name: Marimba One Double Helix DHR3 Medium Hard Rattan Mallets
Description:
The Double Helix Series was developed to bring out the warmth of the fundamental throughout the range of the 5-octave marimba. The relaxed yarn tension on these mallets enhances the smooth, dark attack of the mallet.

The exclusive patent pending “double helix wrap&rdquol; technique allows you to easily identify each mallet in the series. Two strands of yarn are wrapped independently of each other, creating a woven effect. After one of the strands makes a revolution around the mallet head, the other strand makes a revolution, securing the previous strand. This locks the yarn in place and prevents it from unraveling. This unique method of wrapping provides our mallets with their distinct look, and exceptional sound.

Name: Innovative Ludwig Albert IP3103B Soft Birch Marimba Mallets
Description:
This line of professional keyboard mallets by Innovative Percussion has been specifically designed for Belgium marimba artist Ludwig Albert III. The eight models, previously only offered on rattan handles, are now available on natural birch handles with specially weighted rubber cores of varying sizes and degrees of hardness.

The IP3103B is a soft marimba mallet with birch handles.

Name: Innovative Casey Cangelosi CGL2 Rich Articulate Marimba Mallets
Description:
Wrapped in an environmentally friendly bamboo-blended cord, the Casey Cangelosi Series Marimba Mallets combines the rich, warm tonal characteristics of yarn with the articulate clarity of cord. These mallets are built on birch dowels with a natural finish and allow for a heavy bass sound without sounding muddy or washy, a delicate touch for lyrical legato passages that speak from the mallet immediately, and a steady timbre throughout the dynamic range. The two softest mallets are also available with a soft yarn wrap.

The CGL2 is intended to be used as a fast bass mallet and produces a rich bass sound.

Name: Innovative Thomas Burritt TB3 Medium Marimba Mallets
Description:
The Innovative Thomas Burritt TB3 Marimba Mallet is the medium mallet of the series. The player gets superb articulation and balance with less attack and more timbre control. This is achieved by the fact that the core is loosely wrapped with a soft yarn. Special attention has been paid to the balance of this mallet series to create a unique playing experience for the performer. The TB3 will be the most versatile of the series.

Medium synthetic core
Birch handles with a classic walnut stain
Loosely wrapped mallet core to control timbre and minimize attack

Name: Innovative Pius Cheung PIUS4B Medium Hard Marimba Mallets - Birch
Description:
The Innovative Percussion Pius Cheung Series Marimba Mallets features six models with rubber cores of varying hardness. Constructed on Birch handles, each model is wrapped with a very unique alpaca-blend yarn that allows the player to produce a strong musical fundamental at extreme dynamic ranges from the utmost silky pianissimo to peasante fortissimo with minimal effort.

The PIUS4 is a medium hard, high-range mallet for solo playing.

Name: Innovative William Moersch IP503 Med Hard Marimba Mallets
Description:
This four model series of mallets has been designed exclusively for marimba virtuoso William Moersch. The hard acrylic-style core offers a full sound at soft dynamic levels and a bright sound at louder dynamic levels.

Features:
-Hard acrylic-style cores to create a full, bright tone and rich fundamental
-100% imported wool yarn
-Polished, hand-selected birch handles

Name: Malletech Leigh Howard Stevens LS5 Soft Birch Marimba Mallets
Description: Single-toned with a soft brown label. Model LS5 is a wide-range, dark-toned mallet designed for rich struck note passages and general chorale style playing. An LS5 in the soprano position, in conjunction with three LS1 mallets, gives the performer full-ranged velvet-smooth rolling capabilities.

Name: Vic Firth Robert Van Sice Marimba Mallets - Hard
Description:
When the music demands extreme cutting power and a sharp, articulate edge, the Vic Firth M116 Robert Van Sice Hard Marimba Mallets are the perfect tool. Designed for the uppermost registers of the marimba, the M116 easily slices through dense orchestrations and large ensembles.

Designed by a Marimba Master

Respected internationally as a soloist and teacher, Robert Van Sice engineered this series with an exclusive yarn hand-wrapping technique that virtually eliminates the sound of bar contact, ensuring only the pure tone of the rosewood is heard. The yarn is secured via a unique interlocking stitch to maintain the head's integrity, while the extra-long maple handles provide unmatched reach and leverage.

Features:
Voicing: Hard articulation for maximum cutting power and sharp upper-register edge.
Seamless Articulation: Exclusive hand-wrapped yarn eliminates the sound of mallet-to-bar contact.
Extended Leverage: Long maple shafts provide incredible reach across the keyboard.
Dimensions: 17" Length | Maple Handles

Name: Marimba One Double Helix DHB1 Very Hard Birch Mallets
Description:
The Double Helix Series was developed to bring out the warmth of the fundamental throughout the range of the 5-octave marimba. The relaxed yarn tension on these mallets enhances the smooth, dark attack of the mallet.

The exclusive patent pending “double helix wrap” technique allows you to easily identify each mallet in the series. Two strands of yarn are wrapped independently of each other, creating a woven effect. After one of the strands makes a revolution around the mallet head, the other strand makes a revolution, securing the previous strand. This locks the yarn in place and prevents it from unraveling. This unique method of wrapping provides our mallets with their distinct look, and exceptional sound.

Name: Marimba One Wave Wrap WWXB4 Medium Soft Birch Mallets
Description: The WWXB4 is a medium soft mallet with Gray/Cinnamon colored yarn and birch handles. The highest concentration of yarn is wrapped around the mallet's equator, creating an increased striking surface and a mallet that is more responsive than traditionally wrapped mallets. The Wave Wrap's blend of wool and nylon yarn minimizes contact sound and enhances articulation. Using Wave Wrap technology, the mallet is balanced to facilitate the ease of movement in the player's hand. The double equatorial wrap creates a chevron pattern around the playing surface and a distinctive wave on top of the head - two unique visual signatures for these finest of marimba mallets.

Name: Innovative She-e Wu WU3 Medium Birch Marimba Mallets
Description:
The She-e Wu Signature Series Marimba Mallets from Innovative Percussion feature seven mallets of varying hardness, with natural birch handles and a custom blended yarn wrap. Each captures the unique style, sensitivity and essence of the artist that is She-e Wu.

Features:
A combination of hard acrylic-style and hard rubber cores to create a full, bright tone and rich fundamental
Hand-selected unfinished natural birch handles
Wool-blend yarn wrap
Elongated shaped mallet heads

Name: Encore NZ5B Nancy Zeltsman Medium Soft Birch Marimba Mallets
Description:
The Encore NZ5B Nancy Zeltsman "Medium Soft" mallets are a nice, articulate bass mallet. They produce a very warm sound that can also be used in soft graduated sets in the "tenor" position. Birch Handles.

One unique characteristic of my line is that the oval-shape of the mallet head is horizontal rather than vertical. I imagine (and maybe it's true) that the width of the mallet activates more of the vertical grains of wood in every bar-thus contributing to a richer tone. Everything about the construction of my line of mallets-from the cores, to the latex, to the type of yarn-is aimed at helping you to produce a fundamental-rich tone.

- Nancy Zeltsman

Hardness - Medium Soft
Handles - Birch

Name: Innovative She-e Wu WU4 Medium Hard Birch Marimba Mallets
Description:
The She-e Wu Signature Series Marimba Mallets from Innovative Percussion feature seven mallets of varying hardness, with natural birch handles and a custom blended yarn wrap. Each captures the unique style, sensitivity and essence of the artist that is She-e Wu.

Features:
A combination of hard acrylic-style and hard rubber cores to create a full, bright tone and rich fundamental
Hand-selected unfinished natural birch handles
Wool-blend yarn wrap
Elongated shaped mallet heads

Name: Balter Basics Series Birch BB2 Medium Marimba Mallets Blue Yarn
Description:
The Balter Basics Medium marimba Mallet is an excellent all purpose mallet. Medium hardness mallets function well when playing soft and loud fast passages. A fine choice for a first marimba mallet.

Medium blue yarn head
Blue birch handle

Name: Salyers Performance Collection Birch Marimba Mallets - Medium
Description:
The Salyers Percussion PCM30 Performer Collection medium marimba mallet is ideal for use on the middle 3 octaves of the 5 octave marimba. The mallets feature a dual surface birch shaft consisting of a natural, unlacquered grip area for maximum control. The upper portion of the shaft is lacquered for strength and durability. The rubber and latex core is wrapped with a 100% wool yarn.

The Performance Collection marimba mallets were designed with the serious soloist in mind. The collection features rubber and synthetic cores with varying layers of latex and a wool yarn wrap for a warm full-bodied sound.

Name: Marimba One Double Helix DHR4 Medium Rattan Mallets
Description:
The Double Helix Series was developed to bring out the warmth of the fundamental throughout the range of the 5-octave marimba. The relaxed yarn tension on these mallets enhances the smooth, dark attack of the mallet.

The exclusive patent pending “double helix wrap” technique allows you to easily identify each mallet in the series. Two strands of yarn are wrapped independently of each other, creating a woven effect. After one of the strands makes a revolution around the mallet head, the other strand makes a revolution, securing the previous strand. This locks the yarn in place and prevents it from unraveling. This unique method of wrapping provides our mallets with their distinct look, and exceptional sound.

Name: Liberty One LMS Soft Yarn Birch Marimba Mallets
Description:
The Liberty One Series of Marimba Mallets come in three different head types for all of your playing situations and are Great Mallets at a Great Price!!

This version is the LMS model which features a Soft Yarn playing head and is suitable for softer playing as well as on the lower octaves of the Marimba. This model can also be used for suspended cymbal passages that require a softer dynamic level while still achieving a great "whoosh" sound.

Name: Innovative Dan Moore DM28 Jazz Vibe Mallets
Description:
This series of marimba and vibraphone mallets was developed for musician, composer and educator Dr. Dan Moore. Dan feels that creating music is the art of sculpting sound. Whether in a live concert or the recording studio making art with sound is all about choosing the right tools to shape your music. All of the models in the Dan Moore line highlight his full-bodied, resonant, and “fruity” sound. These mallets work well on both marimba and vibes. You can mix and match to help create your own sculpture in sound. All models have rattan handles.

The DM28 jazz vibe mallets are slightly lighter than the DM26. They work well in the upper registers of the marimba for combo/ensemble performance. It features a rich tone with good projection and a modern jazz sound. The DM28 also works well for unaccompanied vibe performances.

Name: Malletech Leigh Howard Stevens LS10 Soft–Medium Hard Birch Marimba Mallets
Description: Soft to medium hard, green label, and multi-toned. The LS10 is a full range, soft to medium-hard mallet that speaks clearly in all registers. This model is warm and full-bodied up to forte where a hint of brightness begins to project. Birch shafts.

Name: Malletech Late Nite Series Soft Mallets - Rattan Handles
Description:
The Malletech Late Night Series grants mallet players the ability to practice on their instrument delivering an extremely low volume sound. Essentially this is the practice pad for mallet players. Play with normal natural feel, mallets to bar. No covers, mutes or bar treatments needed. Perfect for warming up backstage, apartment or dorm living situations.

The LN2R is snugly wrapped with a nylon yarn delivering a soft and quiet tone with articulation.

Rattan Handles

Name: Malletech Concerto Series CN9 Soft to Medium Birch Marimba Mallets
Description:
Soft to medium, multi-toned. The CN9 is excellent for general use in all types of solo and ensemble situations. It will produce clear passage work throughout the full range of the marimba, warm and rich at low volume, with a hint of brightness at higher levels.

The six models that comprise the Concerto Series have been designed specifically for those players looking for a heavy mallet with a big sound that will project through a large ensemble, but do not want the contact noise that is usually associated with this type of mallet. Compared to standard traditional mallets of similar hardness, the player will immediately notice proportionally more fundamental tone and greater volume. While many synthetic yarns suffer from high-pitched “tick”, this yarn is very quiet on the attack, while exceeding the durability and abrasion resistance of nylon.

Name: Innovative William Moersch IP513 - Medium Marimba Mallets
Description:
This William Moersch IP513 Medium Marimba Mallet has been designed exclusively for the marimba virtuoso. The rubber core offers a darker sound than the synthetic core models.

Features:
-rubber cores to create a full, dark tone and rich fundamental
-100% imported wool yarn
-Polished, hand-selected birch handles

Name: Encore NM4B Nanae Mimura Medium Birch Marimba Mallets
Description: Nanae Mimura Series mallets are slightly heavier than NZ Series mallets. They feature rubber disk cores hand wrapped with latex, and are covered by North American wool. Encore's unique hand wrapped latex process enhances the fundamental allowing harder mallets which do not sound harsh, and improves the feel of the mallet's rebound. The yarn is all natural wool which is not chemically processed and therefore particularly soft and durable. (Our yarn is purchased from the sheep farm that harvests the wool - the yarn is so natural that you may occasionally see a small piece of hay from a mallet head!) The softness of their yarn combined with the hardness and clarity of their latex-wrapped disk cores make NM Series mallets two-toned and very versatile. Medium, with birch shafts.

Name: Salyers Etude Series Birch Marimba Mallets - Hard
Description:
The Salyers Percussion E30 hard yarn mallet features birch shafts, a rubber core and high quality wool/nylon blend yarn for a full, round tone.

The Etude Series is designed to be a high quality and economical solution for percussionists and band directors. The Etude Series is made with the same quality materials that you will find on many higher priced alternatives. The design, craftsmanship and material selection set this series apart from other “value” brands on the market today.

Name: Innovative Fundamental Series F1 Soft Marimba Mallets
Description:
Innovative Percussion F1 Soft Marimba Mallets feature black painted birch handles, a rubber core to create a full rich tone, and extra durable synthetic yarn.

Manufactured by the leader in high quality keyboard mallets, the Innovative Percussion Fundamental Series Keyboard Mallets were specifically designed with the beginning percussionist and budget conscious band director in mind. This economical series offers the beginning percussionist and band director a line of quality keyboard mallets at an affordable price.

The Fundamental Series is available in 15 different models. All models feature black birch dowels and the two vibraphone models are also available with high quality rattan handles.

Name: Malletech Late Nite Series Super Soft Mallets - Rattan Handles
Description:
The Malletech Late Night Series grants mallet players the ability to practice on their instrument delivering an extremely low volume sound. Essentially this is the practice pad for mallet players. Play with normal natural feel, mallets to bar. No covers, mutes or bar treatments needed. Perfect for warming up backstage, apartment or dorm living situations.

The LN1R is loosely wrapped with a soft yarn delivering a super soft tone, nearly silent with slurring articulation.

Rattan Handles

Name: Malletech Eric Sammut ES8 Medium To Soft Birch Marimba Mallets
Description: The Malletech Eric Sammut ES8 Marimba Mallets feature a multi-tone medium to soft core mounted on birch handles. These mallets are perfect as a set of four used throughout the entire marimba or as the bass mallet in a graduated set.

Name: Innovative Thomas Burritt TB2 Medium Soft Marimba Mallets
Description:
The Innovative Thomas Burritt TB2 Marimba Mallet is the medium soft mallet of the series. The TB2 delivers a great soft articulation. It sounds rich throughout the entire range of a 5 octave marimba. A perfect mallet for the Bach Cello Suites. The Burritt Mallets feature synthetic cores with loosely wrapped soft yarn. Special attention was paid to the balance of this mallet ensuring the player will have complete timbre control while reducing the attack.

Medium soft synthetic core
Birch handles with a walnut stain
Mallet head is loosely wrapped to minimize attack and promote bar resonance

Name: Innovative Pius Cheung PIUS2B Medium Soft Marimba Mallets - Birch
Description:
The Innovative Percussion Pius Cheung Series Marimba Mallets features six models with rubber cores of varying hardness. Constructed on Birch handles, each model is wrapped with a very unique alpaca-blend yarn that allows the player to produce a strong fundamental tone at extreme dynamic ranges from the utmost silky pianissimo to peasante fortissimo with minimal effort.

The PIUS2 is a medium soft bass mallet for ensemble or concerto playing.

Name: Marimba One Round Sound Birch Marimba Mallets - Medium Hard
Description:
Marimba One Round Sound mallets are the perfect marriage of Marimba One sound quality and the needs of percussionists. The RSB2 is a medium hard mallet, great attack from middle C to the very top, with a birch handle.

Marimba One Round Sound series mallets feature the same Marimba One excellence at a more affordable price. They are a lightweight mallet with warmth and articulation. This is the mallet that works to make you sound great. Double-wound using Marimba One’s exclusive technology.

Name: Innovative Ludwig Albert IP3105 Medium Rattan Marimba Mallets
Description:
This line of professional keyboard mallets has been specifically designed for Belgium marimba artist Ludwig Albert III. The eight models feature shafts constructed of superior quality rattan and specially weighted rubber cores of varying sizes and degrees of hardness. Wool-blend yarn is used to fully maximize the dynamic potential of the line, while the unique shape allows for precise tonal clarity. The length provides an ultimate balance, which will meet the needs of today's professional player.

IP3101 Extra Soft Marimba
IP3102 Medium Extra Soft Marimba
IP3103 Soft Marimba
IP3104 Medium Soft Marimba
IP3105 Medium Marimba
IP3106 Medium Hard Marimba
IP3107 Hard Marimba
IP3108 Extra Hard Marimba

Features:

Rubber cores of varying size, shape, and hardness

Superior quality rattan

Wool-blend yarn wrap

Name: Malletech Michael Burritt MB18 Medium Hard–Hard Birch Marimba Mallets
Description:
Multi-toned, medium hard to hard, with blue label. Offering a wide timbral range and the potential cutting power of a much harder mallet when pushed to high dynamic levels.

Mike is internationally respected as a marimba virtuoso, composer and teacher. The six models of the Michael Burritt Series are built around 1 1/8″ diameter natural rubber cores. All of the models also have one or more additional layers of latex rubber on top of the natural rubber for a more complex multi-toned response pattern. All models are wrapped and stitched with a synthetic blend that has good durability. The yarn has also been designed to have just a touch of contact “chiff” for the extra cutting power Michael requires. All models feature selected birch shafts.

Synthetic Yarn
Medium Hard to Hard Hardness (Multi-tonal)
Birch Shafts
Oval Shaped Mallet Head

Name: Innovative Ludwig Albert IP3107B Hard Birch Marimba Mallets
Description:
This line of professional keyboard mallets by Innovative Percussion has been specifically designed for Belgium marimba artist Ludwig Albert III. The eight models, previously only offered on rattan handles, are now available on natural birch handles with specially weighted rubber cores of varying sizes and degrees of hardness.

The IP3107B is a hard marimba mallet with birch handles.

Name: Yamaha Keiko Abe MKA-07 Soft Rattan Marimba Mallets
Description:
The Soft Mallet from the Yamaha Keiko Abe Mallet Series is the MKA07. The rubber core is wrapped with a 1mm tube is covered in a high quality yarn. The Rattan shaft measures in 430mm and will feel extremely well balanced.

This mallet will be perfect for the lower octaves of a graduated set but could also work in some creative sets where the softer voice is the soprano or alto.

Name: Malletech Concerto Series CN4 Soft Birch Marimba Mallets
Description:
Single-Toned. Model CN4 is a wide-range, soft mallet that is unusually rich in the bass, without being “thumpy” in the upper range.

The six models that comprise the Concerto Series have been designed specifically for those players looking for a heavy mallet with a big sound that will project through a large ensemble, but do not want the contact noise that is usually associated with this type of mallet. Compared to standard traditional mallets of similar hardness, the player will immediately notice proportionally more fundamental tone and greater volume. While many synthetic yarns suffer from high-pitched “tick”, this yarn is very quiet on the attack, while exceeding the durability and abrasion resistance of nylon.

Name: Innovative Weichen Lin Marimba Mallets Birch - Medium
Description:
The Innovative Weichen Lin Medium Marimba Mallets function perfectly across the entire instrument allowing you to achieve clear fundamentals at any dynamic. The blended yarn creates an incredibly versatile mallet, capable of lush Bach chorales as well as more contemporary articulate passages. Built on birch shafts, the rubber cores provide a strong fundamental tone with very little contact sound.

-16 3/4" Total Length

Name: Innovative Soloist Series IP100 Soft Birch Marimba Mallets
Description:
The Innovative Percussion IP100 Soloist Series Soft Marimba Mallets are designed for use in the lower 3 octaves of a 5 octave marimba and feature 100% wool yarn, birch handles and hard rubber cores that help to create a full, rich tome and warm fundamental.

Designed with the marimba virtuoso in mind, the Soloist Series is constructed using hard rubber cores, covered in a series of latex combinations. The mallets are wrapped is a 100% wool wrap, custom manufactured specifically for Innovative Percussion, which delivers a brilliant, rich tone with the warmest fundamental possible in all registers of the marimba. The series is offered on birch handles that are polished for the smoothest natural finish. Each step of production insures a mallet designed to meet the highest standards of today's most demanding marimbist.

Name: Yamaha Keiko Abe Signature Birch Keyboard Mallets Medium Soft
Description:
The MKAW06 is the Medium Soft Mallet from the Yamaha Keiko Abe Mallet series. It has a rubber core with a 1mm tube wrapped around it. The MKAW06 is finished in layers of a high quality yarn. The 430mm straight Birch shaft will feel well balanced.

This is a great mallet for more legato of pieces that require a more delicate touch. Perfect in any place in a graduated set.

Name: Vic Firth American Custom Keyboard - Medium Head - Mushroom
Description:
Vic Firth M3 American Custom Keyboard Mallets feature a medium mushroom head for all-around playing. Vic Firth M3 mallets are 16" long.

The Vic Firth M3 American Custom Keyboard Mallets are designed to address a range of instruments and all dynamic levels. This yarn model features a 3-ply nylon yarn that is virtually indestructible yet provides excellent cushioning for a softer sound.

With birch shafts for rigidity and consistency, they are favored by players who prefer extra reach without the added flexibility of rattan.

Name: Innovative Ivan Trevino Medium Dark Marimba Mallets - Walnut Stained Birch
Description:
The Innovative Ivan Trevino Medium Dark Marimba mallets features a core tailored for a distinct sound and balance. This mallet functions as an all purpose mallet delivering a darker more subtle sound with a clean fundamental. The marimba models feature longer shafts for ease of playing wide intervals.

Handles - Walnut stained birch
Synthetic Core
Green tape indicator on the handle
Length - 16.75"

Name: Malletech Michael Burritt Version 2 MB5-V2 Marimba Mallets - Soft
Description:
Single-toned, soft. A fat sounding mallet that is good for heavy struck note passage work and rolls.

Mike is internationally respected as a marimba virtuoso, composer and teacher. The six models of the Michael Burritt Series are built around 1 1/8″ diameter natural rubber cores. All of the models also have one or more additional layers of latex rubber on top of the natural rubber for a more complex multi-toned response pattern. All models are wrapped and stitched with a synthetic blend that has good durability. The yarn has also been designed to have just a touch of contact “chiff” for the extra cutting power Michael requires. All models feature selected birch shafts.

Synthetic Yarn
Soft Hardness
Birch Shafts
Oval Shaped Mallet Head

Name: Innovative Pius Cheung PIUS3 Medium General Marimba Mallets
Description:
The Innovative Percussion Pius Cheung Series Marimba Mallets features six models with rubber cores of varying hardness. Constructed on rattan handles, each model is wrapped with a very unique alpaca-blend yarn that allows the player to produce a tone of gold at extreme dynamic ranges from the utmost silky pianissimo to peasante fortissimo with minimal effort.

The PIUS3 is a medium, general mid-range mallet for solo playing.

Name: Innovative Rattan Series RS30 Medium-Hard Marimba/Vibraphone Mallet
Description:
The RS30 medium-hard marimba/vibraphone mallets are constructed on durable rattan handles with large
oval cores and are tightly wrapped with synthetic yarn.

Name: Marimba One Katarzyna Mycka KMB2 Hard Birch Mallets
Description:
The Katarzyna Mycka Professional Mallet Series are wrapped very tightly with all synthetic yarn. The combination of synthetic yarn and the tight wrap gives the immediate response of the bar that is required for ensemble and orchestra playing. The heavy weight of these mallets brings out the warmth of the bars by physically putting into motion the fundamental frequency of the bars.

Katarzyna recommends using this hard mallet for such pieces as Leander Kaiser's Hurricane's Eye; Ney Rosauro's Marimba concerto No. 1 (3rd Mvmt, 2nd Mvmt - right hand), No. 2 (3rd Mvmt); Andrew Thomas's Merlin (2nd Mvmt); John Thrower's Aurora borealis (1st Mvmt); Anders Koppel's Concerto No. 1 (3rd Mvmt); and Toshimitsu Tanaka's Two Movements (1st).

Name: Musser Good Vibes Mallets - Medium (M235)
Description:
Musser Good Vibes mallets have long been sought after and recognized as the world’s finest professional mallets. Handles are choice light rattan carefully selected and matched for size, weight, and flex. Select premium cord is wound around a solid, specially formulated and shaped rubber core, then carefully stitched.

Rattan Handle
Hardness - Medium
Cord Wrapped

Name: Malletech Go2 Series-Scott Herring
Description: Malletech Scott Herring mallets perform well in solo repertoire, percussion ensemble and chamber music - and can be combined with other Malletech models to create a 'custom' graduated set.

Name: Malletech Chamber Series CH8 Medium Soft Birch Marimba Mallets
Description:
The Malletech Chamber Series CH8 Medium Soft Birch Marimba Mallets produces wide and fat tones.

-Birch Handles

Name: Marimba One Katarzyna Mycka KMB4 Medium Birch Mallets
Description:
The Katarzyna Mycka Professional Mallet Series are wrapped very tightly with all synthetic yarn. The combination of synthetic yarn and the tight wrap gives the immediate response of the bar that is required for ensemble and orchestra playing. The heavy weight of these mallets brings out the warmth of the bars by physically putting into motion the fundamental frequency of the bars.

Katarzyna recommends using this medium mallet for such pieces as Keiko Abe's Kazak Lullaby (+ one KMB5); Matthias Schmit's Corrido; Ney Rosauro's Concerto No. 1 (1st).

Name: Encore Adam Series Marimba Mallets - Graduated Set Birch
Description:
The Encore Adam Tan Series Marimba Mallets offer a medium weight feel designed for concert solo performances, bringing out the warmth and fundamentals of your marimba sound. The AT Series is comfortable in the hands and plays easily, ideal for all levels and styles of marimba performance.

The mallets feature a latex-wrapped, thick, rubber disk core covered in all natural North American Alpaca wool. The series is also slightly two-toned and extremely versatile in all applications.

The Adam Tan Series Graduated Set is a great starting point for a warm yet clear graduated set with slight weight, that can be used for all kinds of solo repertoire and on all sizes and materials of marimba.

Featuring (from left to right) the AT4 (Medium Soft), two AT3s (Medium) and an AT2 (Medium Hard). You have versatile bass, mid, and high range mallet coverage in addition to being able to use the two AT3s for two mallet solo and ensemble playing when needed.

Name: Marimba One Round Sound Birch Marimba Mallets - Hard
Description:
Marimba One Round Sound mallets are the perfect marriage of Marimba One sound quality and the needs of percussionists. The RSB1 is a hard mallet, great attack from middle C to the very top, with a birch handle.

Marimba One Round Sound series mallets feature the same Marimba One excellence at a more affordable price. They are a lightweight mallet with warmth and articulation. This is the mallet that works to make you sound great. Double-wound using Marimba One’s exclusive technology.

Name: Innovative Rattan Series RS40C Hard Marimba/Vibraphone Mallets
Description:
This Innovative Rattan Series Hard Marimba/Vibraphone Mallet is designed for the percussion ensemble or contemporary mallet player. A tightly cord wrapped graduated rubber core allows this mallet to function on mallet instruments as well as other accessory percussion.
- Matched Rattan Handles

Name: Encore NZ6B Nancy Zeltsman Articulate Bass Birch Marimba Mallets
Description:
The Encore NZ6B Nancy Zeltsman "Articulate Bass" mallets are a very rich bass mallet for general playing, with a bit more articulation than the NZ7. I use this as my bass mallet about 75% of the time. Birch Handles.

One unique characteristic of my line is that the oval-shape of the mallet head is horizontal rather than vertical. I imagine (and maybe it's true) that the width of the mallet activates more of the vertical grains of wood in every bar-thus contributing to a richer tone. Everything about the construction of my line of mallets-from the cores, to the latex, to the type of yarn-is aimed at helping you to produce a fundamental-rich tone.

- Nancy Zeltsman

Hardness - Soft
Handles - Birch

Name: Innovative Soloist Series IP275N Med Hard Legato Birch Marimba Mallets - Natural Handles
Description:
Innovative Percussion's most popular series of solo marimba mallets is now offered with unfinished birch handles thanks to countless requests. All six models are available with a natural finish that provides a more slip resistant grip that is ideal for players who prefer an enhanced grip on their mallets.

The Innovative Percussion IP275N Soloist Series Medium Hard Legato Marimba Mallets are a good solo mallet that works through the entire range of the marimba and feature 100% wool yarn and hard rubber cores that help to create a full, rich tome and warm fundamental.

Designed with the marimba virtuoso in mind, the Soloist Series is constructed using hard rubber cores, covered in a series of latex combinations. The mallets are wrapped is a 100% wool wrap, custom manufactured specifically for Innovative Percussion, which delivers a brilliant, rich tone with the warmest fundamental possible in all registers of the marimba.

Name: Marimba One Beverley Johnston Medium Marimba Mallets - Birch
Description:
The Marimba One Beverley Johnson Medium Marimba Mallets function perfectly on the across the entire instrument delivering even attack and resonance. This mallets utilizes the Wave Wrap Technology creating a balanced feel as well as allowing it to function on the Vibraphone as well. Like most Marimba One Mallets this series adheres to strict manufacturing standards functions across a wide musical range from the contemporary to the classical.

Medium Mallet Head
Birch Handles

Name: Innovative Artisan Series - Medium Marimba Mallet - Cedar
Description:
The Innovative Artisan Series Medium Marimba Mallet functions across the entire instrument delivering even attack and defined fundamentals. This mallets an excellent all purpose mallet fitting into many musical rolls.

Medium graduated rubber core
Cedar handles

Name: Marimba One Round Sound Birch Marimba Mallets - Soft
Description:
Marimba One Round Sound mallets are the perfect marriage of Marimba One sound quality and the needs of percussionists. The RSB5 is a soft mallet, lightweight yet produces a rich and articulate bass sound, with a birch handle.

Marimba One Round Sound series mallets feature the same Marimba One excellence at a more affordable price. They are a lightweight mallet with warmth and articulation. This is the mallet that works to make you sound great. Double-wound using Marimba One’s exclusive technology.

Name: Marimba One Wave Wrap WWXB1 Hard Birch Mallets
Description: The WWXB1 is a hard mallet with Gray/Finch colored yarn and birch handles. The highest concentration of yarn is wrapped around the mallet's equator, creating an increased striking surface and a mallet that is more responsive than traditionally wrapped mallets. The Wave Wrap's blend of wool and nylon yarn minimizes contact sound and enhances articulation. Using Wave Wrap technology, the mallet is balanced to facilitate the ease of movement in the player's hand. The double equatorial wrap creates a chevron pattern around the playing surface and a distinctive wave on top of the head - two unique visual signatures for these finest of marimba mallets.

Name: Innovative Ludwig Albert IP3106 Medium Hard Rattan Marimba Mallets
Description:
This line of professional keyboard mallets has been specifically designed for Belgium marimba artist Ludwig Albert III. The eight models feature shafts constructed of superior quality rattan and specially weighted rubber cores of varying sizes and degrees of hardness. Wool-blend yarn is used to fully maximize the dynamic potential of the line, while the unique shape allows for precise tonal clarity. The length provides an ultimate balance, which will meet the needs of today's professional player.

IP3101 Extra Soft Marimba
IP3102 Medium Extra Soft Marimba
IP3103 Soft Marimba
IP3104 Medium Soft Marimba
IP3105 Medium Marimba
IP3106 Medium Hard Marimba
IP3107 Hard Marimba
IP3108 Extra Hard Marimba

Features:

Rubber cores of varying size, shape, and hardness

Superior quality rattan

Wool-blend yarn wrap

Name: Yamaha Keiko Abe Signature Birch Keyboard Mallets Medium Hard
Description:
Yamaha's Keiko Abe Mallet series gives us the MKAW05 Medium Hard Mallet. It features a rubber core with a 1mm tube Wrapped around it. A high quality yarn makes for the finishing wrap. The Birch shaft is measured at 430mm.

This mallet will function pretty well in the soprano or alto voice in a graduated set. You'll also find it has its place in the lower voices too. A good all around mallet.

Name: Innovative She-e Wu WU4C Medium Hard Concerto Birch Marimba Mallets
Description: The WU4C Medium Hard Concerto models are an addition to the She-e Wu Series marimba mallets. This model is constructed much like the existing WU4, but with a tightly wrapped bamboo yarn. This design produces a bright, staccato timbre that speaks very quickly and will help cut through a large ensemble.

Name: Innovative Tom Rarick IP3004 Hard Birch Marimba Mallets
Description:
While the contributions of the front ensemble continue to evolve within the marching idiom, so do the demands of the mallets that are used by their highly talented players. Tom Rarick, percussion arranger for the Bluecoats Drum & Bugle Corps, has assisted Innovative Percussion with the design of this unique series of keyboard mallets.

The Tom Rarick Series marimba mallets from Innovative Percussion feature large round cores wrapped with a light grey synthetic wool-blend yarn, while the vibraphone mallets have cord-wrapped large oval cores. All 7 models are built on slightly larger (11/32") polished birch handles. The heavier cores increase projection and enhance the fundamental tone, while the larger handles help balance and control.

IP3001 - Soft Marimba
IP3002 - Medium Soft Marimba
IP3003 - Medium Hard Marimba
IP3004 - Hard Marimba
IP3005 - Soft Vibraphone
IP3006 - Medium Vibraphone
IP3007 - Hard VIbraphone

Name: Vic Firth Robert Van Sice Marimba Mallets - Very Soft
Description:
Vic Firth M111 Robert Van Sice Very Soft Marimba Mallets offer a warm, round sound that is perfect for low register chorales.

Respected internationally as a soloist, teacher and masterclass instructor, Robert Van Sice designed this series of yarn wound marimba mallets with an exclusive hand-wrapping technique that virtually eliminates the sound of bar contact. A special interlocking stitch pattern maintains the integrity of the head. With extra long maple handles for read and leverage. In pairs.

Length: 17"

Name: Marimba One Wave Wrap WWXB5 Soft Birch Mallets
Description: The WWXB5 is a soft mallet with Gray/Ruby colored yarn and birch handles. The highest concentration of yarn is wrapped around the mallet's equator, creating an increased striking surface and a mallet that is more responsive than traditionally wrapped mallets. The Wave Wrap's blend of wool and nylon yarn minimizes contact sound and enhances articulation. Using Wave Wrap technology, the mallet is balanced to facilitate the ease of movement in the player's hand. The double equatorial wrap creates a chevron pattern around the playing surface and a distinctive wave on top of the head - two unique visual signatures for these finest of marimba mallets.

Name: Innovative Mark Ford Rhapsody Series - IP822 Medium-Hard Marimba Mallets
Description:
