Name: Marimba One Ivana Bilic IBB5 Very Soft Birch Mallets
Description:
The Marimba One Ivana Bilic model IBB5 Smooth Bass model have choral quality and a velvet humming sound. It is ideal for roll sections and legato playing.

Ivana Bilic wanted her new mallet line to emphasize the singing characteristic of the marimba, by relating the sound that each mallet makes to human vocal qualities. Her definitions for each mallet combine the ideal playing range for a mallet with the color/timbre of its sound.

These mallets are on Birch Handles.

Name: Marimba One Katarzyna Mycka KMR5 Medium Soft Rattan Mallets
Description:
The Katarzyna Mycka Professional Mallet Series are wrapped very tightly with all synthetic yarn. The combination of synthetic yarn and the tight wrap gives the immediate response of the bar that is required for ensemble and orchestra playing. The heavy weight of these mallets brings out the warmth of the bars by physically putting into motion the fundamental frequency of the bars.

Katarzyna recommends using this medium soft mallet for such pieces as Anna Ignatowicz's Toccata; Ney Rosauro's Concerto No. 2 (2nd Mvmt); Minoru Miki's Marimba Spiritual (opening part).

Name: Marimba One Ivana Bilic IBR3 Medium Rattan Mallets
Description:
The Marimba One Ivana Bilic model IBR3 Boy Alto mallets are a “shy” mallet that doesn't look for a flashy entrance. It is slightly lighter and softer then IBR5, introspective with a pure and “innocent” sound, and ideal for chamber music and J.S. Bach.

Ivana Bilic wanted her new mallet line to emphasize the singing characteristic of the marimba, by relating the sound that each mallet makes to human vocal qualities. Her definitions for each mallet combine the ideal playing range for a mallet with the color/timbre of its sound.

These mallets are on Rattan Handles.

Name: Innovative Ludwig Albert IP3108 Extra Hard Rattan Marimba Mallets
Description:
This line of professional keyboard mallets has been specifically designed for Belgium marimba artist Ludwig Albert III. The eight models feature shafts constructed of superior quality rattan and specially weighted rubber cores of varying sizes and degrees of hardness. Wool-blend yarn is used to fully maximize the dynamic potential of the line, while the unique shape allows for precise tonal clarity. The length provides an ultimate balance, which will meet the needs of today's professional player.

Name: Encore Kana Omori Signature Soft Marimba Mallets - Birch
Description: This Encore Kana Omori signature mallet features a Soft – Heavily weighted Latex wrapped rubber disk covered with wool yarn – Birch Handles

Name: Encore 25LB Latex Wrapped Soft Birch Mallets
Description: Based on the traditional marimba mallets of Mexico and Central America, the Latex Wrapped Series mallets clearly articulate the fundamental pitch of marimba bars. These mallets are offered in five degrees of hardness, and they provide unique color options for marimba as wells as auxiliary percussion. Soft, with birch shafts.

Name: Musser Birch Handle Mallets - 1" Medium Rubber (M402)
Description:
Musser M402 Mallets feature a Brown 1.125" medium rubber head with birch handles. The recommended use is for marimba or xylophone.

Musser mallets are crafted with the finest grade materials, ensuring a carefully balanced instrument with attention to flex, weight, size, and tonal response. These mallets are precision-matched for balance and are available with various head materials, including rubber, plastic, metal, and yarn-covered balls, catering to diverse playing preferences. For those who prefer a straight yet firm handle, the birch-handled mallets are an ideal choice. The heads, available in rubber, plastic, or yarn, are also precision-matched for optimal balance, ensuring a consistent and controlled playing experience.

Birch Handles
1.125" Medium Rubber Head
Head Diameter - 1.125"
Length - 15"

Name: Malletech Concerto Series CN4R Soft Rattan Marimba Mallets
Description: The Malletech CN4R Marimba Mallet is from the Concerto Series. This rattan handle mallet is capable of a wide range of tones. From rich powerful bass notes to the upper registrar of the marimba this will get the job done with out sounding thumpy.

Name: Innovative Series CS41B Medium Hard Vibraphone / Marimba Mallets - Birch
Description:
The Innovative Chamber Series CS41B Medium-Hard Vibraphone/Marimba Mallets deliver less attack than the hardest mallets while still offering very articulate tones.

The Chamber Series Mallets are designed with oval-shaped rubber cores of varying hardness, delivering clear tones and a broad range of articulations. Available with either Birch or Rattan handles, each 15-inch mallet is wrapped in black cord, accented by distinctive color stitching at the top and bottom of the mallet head. Combining versatility and practicality, the Chamber Series is well-suited for chamber ensembles, solo percussion performances, and percussion ensemble applications.

Specifications:
Green Stitching
Length - 15"
Cord wrapped with a distinctive circle stitching
Handles - Birch
Oval Medium-Hard Rubber Core

Name: Vic Firth Theodor Milkov Soft Marimba Mallets
Description:
The Vic Firth Theodor Milkov Soft Marimba Mallets deliver a strong but musical fundamental with minimal attack. Ideal doing rolls and the low register of the instrument.

Length: 17''
Head material/color: Mohair Yarn/Black
Handle Material: Hickory

Name: Salyers Percussion Kai Stensgaard Signature Marimba Mallets - Medium Soft
Description:
Salyers Percussion Kai Stensgaard Signature Medium Soft Marimba Mallets are designed by world-renowned marimba artist Kai Stensgaard, this series features natural/unfinished birch shafts, rubber cores and a wool yarn wrap. The five models are graduated in hardness and weight. Kai is an accomplished 6-mallet player and has designed his mallets to be very manageable using either 4 or 6 mallet grip. The sound throughout the series is clear and warm. The white yarn provides excellent visual awareness for the performer and each model is color-coded for quick and easy identification.

Although designed for the professional player, many teachers and students prefer these mallets for their traditional weight and sound.

Name: Innovative Weichen Lin Marimba Mallets Rattan - Bass
Description:
The Innovative Weichen Lin Bass Marimba Mallets function perfectly on the bass notes on the instrument allowing you to achieve punchy bass note to smooth rolls. The blended yarn creates an incredibly versatile mallet, capable of lush Bach chorales as well as more contemporary articulate passages. Built on rattan shafts, the rubber cores provide a strong fundamental tone with very little contact sound.

-16 3/4" Total Length

Name: Encore NM1B Nanae Mimura Extra Hard Birch Marimba Mallets
Description: Nanae Mimura Series mallets are slightly heavier than NZ Series mallets. They feature rubber disk cores hand wrapped with latex, and are covered by North American wool. Encore's unique hand wrapped latex process enhances the fundamental allowing harder mallets which do not sound harsh, and improves the feel of the mallet's rebound. The yarn is all natural wool which is not chemically processed and therefore particularly soft and durable. (Our yarn is purchased from the sheep farm that harvests the wool - the yarn is so natural that you may occasionally see a small piece of hay from a mallet head!) The softness of their yarn combined with the hardness and clarity of their latex-wrapped disk cores make NM Series mallets two-toned and very versatile. Hard, with birch shafts.

Name: Dragonfly Percussion Practice Marimba Mallets - Birch
Description: The Dragonfly Percussion Practice Marimba Mallets deliver a very reduced volume while still offering a proper feel. Designed with the size and weight of a medium marimba mallet but with an ultra-soft core and covering. The reduced volume is perfect when low volume is needed as well as warm-ups before a show or contest.

Name: Innovative Chamber Series CS51B Hard Vibraphone / Marimba Mallets - Birch
Description:
The Innovative Chamber Series CS51B Hard Vibraphone/Marimba Mallets are the hardest in the series offering very articulate tones.

The Chamber Series Mallets are designed with oval-shaped rubber cores of varying hardness, delivering clear tones and a broad range of articulations. Available with either Birch or Rattan handles, each 15-inch mallet is wrapped in black cord, accented by distinctive color stitching at the top and bottom of the mallet head. Combining versatility and practicality, the Chamber Series is well-suited for chamber ensembles, solo percussion performances, and percussion ensemble applications.

Specifications:
Yellow Stitching
Length - 15"
Cord wrapped with a distinctive circle stitching
Handles - Birch
Oval Hard Rubber Core
